creator: melsonr@earthlink.net
text:
I'll add to this that this failure didn't occur until after the recent
gnome updates.  I have rebuilt gramps and every port listed as a
requirement for gramps, but to no avail.  Still get the error message
indicated in the original PR.

Bob Melson
